name: DBhopper
description: NRW Mobilitätsgarantie claim tools and Deutsche Bahn delay-query tools.

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workspaceRoot.help: Directory containing claims/ and assets/ for DBhopper.

browserExecutablePath.label: Browser Executable
browserExecutablePath.help: Chromium or Chrome executable used by Playwright.

artifactRoot.label: Artifact Root
artifactRoot.help: Directory for browser-run screenshots and text captures.

headless.label: Headless Browser
headless.help: Run browser filing without showing a window.

workspaceRoot.description: Top-level directory containing claims/ and assets/. Defaults to the plugin package directory.

browserExecutablePath.description: Optional Chromium or Chrome executable path for browser filing.

artifactRoot.description: Optional directory for browser-run artifacts. Defaults to workspaceRoot/tmp.

headless.description: Whether browser filing runs headless by default.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for one browser filing operation.

approvalMode.description: Approval behavior. Defaults to all claim tools; use mutating for read-only claim tools without approval.

timetableBaseUrl.description: Optional DB Timetables API base URL override.

delayProvider.description: Delay provider. auto uses DB Timetables when credentials exist, otherwise bahn-web.

bahnWebBaseUrl.description: Optional bahn-web base URL override, restricted to https://int.bahn.de/web/api or https://www.bahn.de/web/api.

bahnWebTransport.description: bahn-web transport. auto tries native fetch, curl, then browser fetch.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for one DB delay HTTP request.

delayLookbackMinutes.description: Extra planned-board lookback used to catch delayed trains scheduled before the lower bound.

timeZone.description: Default IANA timezone for local delay-query times.
